expectedValidationSummaries.baseline-fixtures-x-new-code: Baseline fixtures validated against the candidate code.
expectedValidationSummaries.new-fixtures-x-new-code: New fixtures validated against the candidate code.

expectedLogPreview: VALIDATION: baseline + candidate fixture passes recorded
acceptance: dry-run is the default execution mode and must not mutate the host target
evolution mode records two independent validation passes and writes execution evidence
apply mode only mutates the host target when the explicit apply callback is enabled
